name: Kenilworth Modern Rectangle Bar Table Walnut Finish - Christopher Knight Home: Chic High-Top, Pub Style, Seats 4
description:
From cozy brunches to casual cocktail parties, our bar table will give your decor a trendy upgrade in the atmosphere. With a high-pressure laminate tabletop and rubberwood legs, this piece is made to last with its highly durable properties. Crafted with clean lines and a chic structure, this table will anchor your dining space in an inviting style that is perfect for small-scale spaces and apartments. This table will blend seamlessly into any arrangement, making this the perfect conversation spot in your home.

MODERN: Our pub table features a modern design with its clean-cut lines and simple yet sophisticated structure. Completed with a refined X-stretcher and sleek tapered legs, this piece creates a timeless look for any home.

HIGH-PRESSURE LAMINATE: One of the most durable decorative surfaces, our table is created from multiple layers of resin that is heated and pressed into a single rigid sheet to provide you with a tabletop that will last for years. This material resists burns, UV rays, gouging, stains, and scratches while also offering heat-resistant, fire-resistant, and anti-graffiti properties.

RUBBERWOOD LEGS: Our environmentally-friendly wood frame not only offers plenty of durability, but it also gives this piece a beautiful natural-grain look. Combined with a gorgeous finish, this wood will truly stand out in any room.

BAR HEIGHT: This table has a height of 42.00 inches, making this perfect addition to any kitchen or dining room.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this table. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
